problem: Phone controls appeared unresponsive because legacy capsule/cell controls were still enabled alongside MainCellSwimmingController.

studio_findings_before_fix.risk: CellPlayerBootstrap and MainCellSwimmingController both attach movement physics to the player; ExplorerControls also owns a mobile touch UI for the capsule.

source_change.change: Main cell controller installation now disables legacy StarterPlayerScripts: CellPlayerBootstrap, ExplorerControls, and CellCytoplasmLightingController.

next_device_review: Android: verify the main swim touch pad now moves without capsule control interference.
Quest: verify no old capsule controller captures the navigation gamepad while swimming.
